# MobilityGrid

> Fleet Operating System for India — digital rent collection, driver KYC, real-time tracking, and fleet management for EV and gig economy operators.

## What is MobilityGrid?

MobilityGrid is a SaaS platform built for India's fleet operators and gig workers. It helps fleet owners manage vehicles, drivers, daily rent collection, KYC verification, and real-time GPS tracking — all in one place.

## Who is it for?

- **Fleet Owners / Operators**: Manage vehicles, collect rent digitally, track drivers, view earnings dashboard
- **Fleet Managers**: Oversee operations, manage driver onboarding, handle KYC approvals
- **Drivers / Riders**: Track dues, make payments, view attendance, communicate with owner

## Key Features

- Digital rent collection (UPI + Cash)
- Driver KYC and document verification
- Real-time GPS fleet tracking
- Automated daily rent deduction
- Driver attendance tracking
- Partner network for fleet operators
- Multi-owner company management

## Contact

- Website: https://mobilitygrid.in
